title: Cable Clips, 10 mm 100 Pcs Nail Clips Strong Durable White Round Cable Tacks, Wall Wire Tidy Holder Clip Management Cable Pins
features: [ 1 Size ] 1 size cable clips : 10mm x 100 Pcs. Satisfy you to organize most size cables at home, can easily organize a variety of specifications of wires.

[ Steel Nail ] Cable clips with steel nail are more strong than self-adhesive cable clips, the wires will not fall off frequently and will not waste rework time. Cable clips can be nailed into cement wall.
[ Durable ] Durable plastic material, white style is more versatile, and integrates with the home environment to make it cleaner.

[ Wide USE ] The cable clips perfect for RG8X, RG58, RG59 or LMR 240 coax cable, RG6 digital video or audio coaxial cable, Ethernet Cat 5, Cat 6 network cable, 12 to 16 AWG speaker wire, phone wire, USB cable, Christmas light etc. Make your home more tidy and free up a lot of space. Cable clips can also improve the safety of electricity use and protect the safety of family members, especially children.
[ Easy Install ] The installation steps of the wire clip are very simple and can be completed by one person, so that the family can live in a comfortable and safe environment.
